The '''Cell of Imu''' was the storehouse of the eccentric [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Humat]] established more than 19,000 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="CCW" />

Located in the [[Petrax Historic Quarter|Petrax Quarter]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the Cell of Imu was rumored to contain Humat's collection of odd and arcane devices. The centerpiece of this collection was a [[Milk/Legends|milky]]-white talisman known as the [[soul stealer]]. To protect his collection, Humat installed a number of deadly traps in his vault and left behind numerous animal [[Skeleton/Legends|skeletons]] reanimated with [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] magic.<ref name="CCW" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
